phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso dell'Arena, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so del-LAH-reh-nah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove sono i servizi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh SOH-noh eer ser-VEE-tsyee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso ordinare un aperitivo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POS-soh or-dee-NAH-reh oon ah-peh-ree-TEE-voh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, please take a seat at the table.

responses.english: Yes, please take a seat at the table.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un caffè, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh KWAN-toh KOS-tah oon kaf-FEH per fa-VO-reh

likely_response.local: Un caffè costa circa un euro.
likely_response.pronunciation: OON KAHF-fè KOH-stah CHEER-kah OON eh-OO-roh
likely_response.translation_en: A coffee costs about one euro.

responses.english: A coffee costs about one euro.
responses.phonetic: OON KAHF-fè KOH-stah CHEER-kah OON eh-OO-roh
responses.french: Un caffè costa circa un euro.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un tavolo libero, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon TAH-voh-loh LEE-beh-roh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is a free table.

responses.english: Yes, there is a free table.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Palazzo della Gran Guardia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel pa-LAT-soh del-lah gran GWAR-dyah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: In front of the Arena, there.

responses.english: In front of the Arena, there.
